auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Prerender API token sent as prerenderToken in REST API requests. Copy it from Account Settings in the Prerender dashboard: https://dashboard.prerender.io/

actions.name: add_sitemap
actions.description: Submit a sitemap XML URL to Prerender so it can discover and cache new URLs from that sitemap.

url.description: The sitemap XML URL to submit to Prerender.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for submitting a sitemap to Prerender.

anyOf.description: The raw Prerender response payload when one was returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result for a successful Prerender write request.

actions.name: clear_cache
actions.description: Queue a Prerender cache clear request for URLs matching a wildcard query pattern.

query.description: The wildcard query used to match cached URLs to clear, such as https://example.com%.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for queueing a Prerender cache clear request.

status.description: The cache clear job state reported by Prerender.

anyOf.description: The raw Prerender response payload when one was returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result returned by the Prerender cache clear API.

actions.name: get_cache_clear_status
actions.description: Check whether a Prerender cache clear job is currently running for the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input parameters.

status.description: The current cache clear job state reported by Prerender.

anyOf.description: The raw Prerender response payload when one was returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Prerender cache clear status response.

actions.name: recache_urls
actions.description: Queue one or more URLs for first-time caching or recaching with the Prerender recache API.

items.description: One public URL to cache or recache.

urls.description: The public URLs to cache or recache.

adaptiveType.description: The Prerender adaptive cache type to target.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for queueing one or more Prerender recache URLs.

anyOf.description: The raw Prerender response payload when one was returned.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result for a successful Prerender write request.
